titles.title: You Alone Are What I need

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You alone are what I need Only You Lord I seek Without You where can I ever be Won't You come to me Or I'll perish without Thee

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I need You Lord I need You Lord right now I need You Lord I need You Lord right now I lift my hands and bow my knees To worship at Your throne I need You Lord I need You Lord right now

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Here I am O Lord my God Your Holy Spirit I need To face the threats of the enemies Please come now to me Or I can't live without Thee

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I just can't make it through Without You I just can't live without You No No No No Lord
